# Copilot Instructions

## Changelog

Whenever you make a change to the codebase, add a corresponding entry to `CHANGELOG.md` under an `## [Unreleased]` section at the top (create it if it doesn't exist). Follow the [Keep a Changelog](https://keepachangelog.com/) format, using the appropriate subsection: **Added**, **Changed**, **Fixed**, **Removed**, **Deprecated**, or **Security**.
